question: What is the total ticket expense of the visitors whose membership level is 1?
gold_sql: SELECT sum(t2.Total_spent) FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id  =  t2.visitor_id WHERE t1.Level_of_membership  =  1
predicted_sql: SELECT SUM(T1.aggregate_attr_167b8c) FROM visit AS T1 JOIN visitor AS T2 ON T1.attr_127870_key = T2.key WHERE T2.attr_c9e9a8_of_attr_b46127 = 1;
raw_response: SELECT SUM(T1.aggregate_attr_167b8c) FROM visit AS T1 JOIN visitor AS T2 ON T1.attr_127870_key = T2.key WHERE T2.attr_c9e9a8_of_attr_b46127 = 1;
